title: Kaworu
wikitext:
[]: Kaworu             Quote Post by Ocelot » Tue Aug 26, 2008 1:59 pm I really hope he has a bigger role in Rebuild. He was essentially Rei's counterpart but as a character he was far more interesting.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Aug 26, 2008 2:05 pm There are a lot of other threads like this, the search function is your friend. But... "Kawrou is not a character, Kawrou is a plot device..."

[]:             Quote Post by Sharaz Destler » Tue Aug 26, 2008 2:09 pm I actually have a theory that Kaworu is not Rei's counterpart, but Fuyutsuki's . What that means for Fuyutsuki, I don't know.

[]:             Quote Post by IrkenEvangelion » Tue Aug 26, 2008 2:13 pm By the way, welcome to the forums, Ocelot. I bet Kawrou won't show up until the end of Rebuild 2.0

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Tue Aug 26, 2008 4:18 pm Rebuild stuff is to be talked about in the Rebuild section. Thread needs to be moved.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Tue Sep 16, 2008 4:21 pm Tangential reply from here . Zaiku wrote: Kaworu is getting his own books now? It's good to seem him becoming more of a character than a plot device.

[]:             Quote Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Tue Sep 16, 2008 5:22 pm well, I hate to be Captain Obvious, but I think the "coffin on da moon bidness" as Imp put it might mean something of significance

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Tue Sep 16, 2008 8:50 pm It's pretty obvious that Kaworu is actually gonna be a character this time around since he showed up only after Ramiel.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Wed Sep 17, 2008 2:08 pm Iron Rooster wrote: It's pretty obvious that Kaworu is actually gonna be a character this time around since he showed up only after Ramiel.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Sep 17, 2008 3:02 pm Or he still won't actually have that much screen time or character development, despite being introduced earlier in the overall time line.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Thu Sep 18, 2008 2:52 am I hope that he does though. I'm a massive Kaworu fan, I don't know why... I only saw him for 13 minutes of screen time and he didn't get THAT much screen time in EoE. But he is still awesome! He may be introduced as a classmate to Shinji, he might have similar relations to the other characters like in all those NGE spin off mangas. Then again, this may just be a slight appearence and things will go according to NGE TV. However, with all the other changes, such as more Eva Units and this Glasses Girl Mari being in Rebuild, it is quite possible for Kaworu to become a true 'character'. (Also, Rebuild is non-canon, so expect the unexpected).

[]:             Quote Post by mastervampire » Thu Sep 18, 2008 4:17 am Zaiku wrote: He may be introduced as a classmate to Shinji,

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Sep 18, 2008 4:30 am Well, there's always the "Mysterious transfer student" role, which Kaworu could fill just as well as Itsuki does. @mastervampire At this point you reminded me of the "Kaworu's 'sexy no jutsu'" strip ("He is an angel -- but in a good way ").

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Sep 18, 2008 8:29 am (Also, Rebuild is non-canon, so expect the unexpected).

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Thu Sep 18, 2008 3:53 pm You know, it really couldn't hurt to have Kaworu as a major character. Maybe he could explain ambiguous plot points, being an Angel and all. The original series had too many scenes that went like this: *************************************** Gendou: Rei, descend to Terminal Dogma and retrieve the Lance of Longinus. Kozo: The Lance of Longinus?! But, sir, shouldn't we explain what that is, for the audience's sake? I mean, otherwise they might get confused and think it's the actual spear used to pierce Jesus' side, even though it's clearly too big to have been wielded by a human. Gendou: We don't owe them an explanation, damn it! Let them wait for the video game releases! ******************************** Hopefully, with the addition of Kaworu, that scene will go more like this: ************************************* Gendou: Rei, get the Lance of Longinus! Kozo: What's the Lance of Longinus? Kaworu:It is a spear which has a will and is a type of lifeform capable of moving by itself. This is an item close to a god and thus able to put a Seed of Life (Progenitor Entity), who holds the power of eternal life, into suspended animation, and this is the reason why the Seed of Life (Progenitor Entity) does not reach god-status. The First Ancestral Race prepared this as a counter- measure in the event that a Seed of Life (Progenitor Entity) did not follow their own goals. Kozo: (nonplussed) That...that actually made sense! **************************** But the cynic in me suspects that it will be more like this: ************************************ Gendou: Rei, descend to Terminal Dogma and retrieve the Spear of Destiny. Kozo: Not the Spear of Destiny! Gendou: See? Rebuild is different .

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Sep 18, 2008 11:15 pm Evangelion? EXPLAIN itself? Surely you jest, wot wot.

[]:             Quote Post by FallenTabris » Fri Sep 19, 2008 3:30 am Lucretius: 5-star post right there.

[]:             Quote Post by Zaiku » Fri Sep 19, 2008 4:44 am Evangelion? EXPLAIN itself? Surely you jest, wot wot.

[]:             Quote Post by Lucretius » Thu Oct 02, 2008 8:29 am Just saw what appears to be some sort of Webuild movie pamphlet on THAT BOARD. Kaworu is described as a "mysterious boy" who " seems to know Shinji. " Maybe the sequel theory isn't bunk after all.

[]:             Quote Post by AuraTwilight » Thu Oct 02, 2008 8:43 am He seemed to know who Shinji was before meeting him in the original anime too, it's not as significant as people think it is.
